name: Oatmeal-Chocolate Morsel Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and stir well until fully incorporated.
2. Drop dough by rounded spoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto a lightly greased cookie baking sheet.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges are golden brown.
4. Remove cookies from the oven and transfer them to wire racks to cool.
Yield: approximately 6 dozen cookies
Source: Southern Living
